## [Engineering] Pull Request

> **Engineering owns:** Implementation, tests, and JavaDoc updates.
> Do NOT change method signatures without R&D sign-off.
> Pull from the same `feature/<classname>` branch R&D created.

## What was implemented?

## Feature Branch
`feature/`

## Testing
- [ ] Tests written for all implemented methods
- [ ] Edge cases and exceptions covered
- [ ] All tests pass (`mvn test`)

## Checklist
- [ ] Pulled latest from `feature/<classname>` before starting
- [ ] Signatures unchanged from R&D spec (or R&D was consulted)
- [ ] JavaDoc updated if behavior differs from spec
- [ ] Ready for review session
